title: The Wackiest Ship in the Army
writer: Richard Murphy, Herb Margolis, William Raynor
actors: Jack Lemmon, Ricky Nelson, John Lund
plot: During WW2, Lt. Rip Crandall, who was a yachtsman before the war, takes command of the USS Echo, a sailing ship, for a secret mission in waters patrolled by Japanese warships.
